raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is resting on top of box_1 with its left, right and front faces unobstructed. Sufficient space exists around the stack for both end-effectors to approach the box from its lateral sides without colliding with nearby objects or the tabletop.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors, lifted clear of box_1 and no longer in contact with box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (right of box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding box_2 and the tabletop area to the right of box_1 is free of obstacles and large enough to receive the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is placed on the tabletop to the right side of box_1 and released by the robot, leaving the top of box_1 fully accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is now exposed on all lateral sides and on its top. There is sufficient clearance for both end-effectors to approach its left and right faces without interference from other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by the robot’s two arms and lifted off the tabletop, completing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is resting on top of box_1 with its left, right and front faces unobstructed. Sufficient space exists around the stack for both end-effectors to approach the box from its lateral sides without colliding with nearby objects or the tabletop.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors, lifted clear of box_1 and no longer in contact with box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding box_2 and the tabletop area to the right of box_1 is free of obstacles and large enough to receive the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is placed on the tabletop to the right side of box_1 and released by the robot, leaving the top of box_1 fully accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is now exposed on all lateral sides and on its top. There is sufficient clearance for both end-effectors to approach its left and right faces without interference from other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by the robot’s two arms and lifted off the tabletop, completing the task of picking up the darker box.
